full_text:
Teng Yin (Chengsi) 滕胤 (承嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Teng Yin (滕胤), styledChengsi (承嗣). Minister of Wu from its creation. Argued to Sun Jun that Zhuge Ke should be put to death. Teng Yin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Teng Yin lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
